TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Makutaay, title = Makutaay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Makutaay} }

S.FORM: == Makutaay == Makutaay hananay, itiniay i pasawali nu Taywan, mililis tu lutuk mikecur tu Taypinyang ku kasa niyaru' nu Makutaay. Katimul nuna niyaru' u cepu' nu Talawadaw. Anu paka'amis ku rakat isu,matafesiwhu ku talawadaw i,ira kuya sacecay sanay a lutuk tumireng i kawali ,mahapinang tu kuna niaru' itatihi. I ti:yahu i, caayay kaitini ku paluma'an nuna niyaru', na miingidayho i tatihi nu talawadaw ku paluma'an nu tu'asan nangra. Kairaan nu Holam tayni i Taywan,malala'is, caay pakafilu,fulaw saan tayra i Cilangasan hananay a lutuk a maru' ku tamdaw nuna Makutaay ma'emin. Naikuran tu i,ira ku suwal tu caayay tu pisa'ada ku kwaping nu holam saan i ,mafulaw aca ma'epud nai Cilangasan ,ta hicera saan tona paniyaru'an tahanini. Anu u Makutaay hanen a mipangangan kuna niyaru' saw? Pakayniay i ka'amis nuna niyaru' ira kuya 'alu., anu ma'uradtu anca macidaltu, manguta:itu ku nanum nuna 'alu,saka pangangan hantu nu matu'asay ku "mangutaay" , nika masasirumatu ku ngiha' tahanini, "Makutaay" saan toko pangangang. Una Makutaay a niyaru', u satapangan kahiceraan nu misapancahay saan. Tiri' han i cuka nu Taywan i, i ka'amis nu patatikuan nu cidal kunis , tatudung i sasifu'an nu Taywan ku Makutaay. Ira ku suwal nu matu'asay atu tilid nu mitiliday, ya miliyas tu (Cilangasan} a lutuk maluklun a mafulaw i, ma^min itini i taliyok nu talawadaw pacarcar a maru'. Nanuyaan i,palitemek satu masangsangasaw a maliwaswas; pasi'amis ku pasi'amisay,pasitimul ku pasitimulay, ira ku talaetipay.Lupisak satu a mafulaw, dengantu ya talaikuray tu cekiw atu pudaw ku ma'usaway a masaniyaru'. Kacanglahan itu, anu matatama tu sa'ayaway a keleng atu cedas i, kaluklunan nu kalang tala riyar. Micadiway ku i niyaru'ay a tamdaw i, salufulufuc sapawtiwti saan ku kalang, malu sapalada' tu tamdaw nu fiyafiyaway a niyaru'. Uruma satu kadufahay ku pudaw i talawadaw, caay ka nikaw tu sasimi. Limaay ku kasangasaw nuna niyaru'-pacidalan, cilangasan, sadipungan, munali ato cikatupay. Anini, caayaytu pipalafang a malahulul, nikawrira, caay pisawad a mapulung a misangasaw tu mihca^caan, itini a mahapinan ku rayray nu kasalawinawina. Maherek ku kapanayan nu kaciherangan i,u piilisinan itu.Tahanini i,masaslalslal ho ku kasa'upu^ nu niyaru'. U mama nu kapah a selal ku milikakawaay tu demak nu niyru',ya ruma sasafaay a selal i,iraay a masilsil ku malu tayal nangra.Romasatu, misacepu' ku tadamanay a demak nu niyaru'Ayaw no kaciherangan i,mapulun ko fa'inayan no niyaro' i riyar,tudung pi'aray tu pafeli no kawas to kakaenen.Tahanini i,ilisin atu misacepu' tata'angay a demak nu Makutaay.Anu cilimaw i, katayni i niyaru' nu Makutaay a minengneng tuna fangcalay a serangwan,ta mafana' kiso tu 'urip nu misapancahay.
S.PHON: == mako~u~utaaj == mako~u~utaaj ħananaj, itiniaj i pasawaɾi no~u~u tajwan, miɾiɾis to~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk mikəʦo~u~ur to~u~u tajpinjaŋ ko~u~u kasa nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~utaaj. katimo~u~uɾ no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u ʦəpo~u~uʡ no~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~u pakaʡamis ko~u~u rakat iso~u~u,matafəsiwħo~u~u ko~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw i,ira ko~u~uja saʦəʦaj sanaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk to~u~umirəŋ i kawaɾi ,maħapinaŋ to~u~u ko~u~una niaro~u~uʡ itatiħi. i ti:jaħo~u~u i, ʦaajaj kaitini ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaʡan no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ, na miiŋiɬ~ɮajħo~u i tatiħi no~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaʡan no~u~u to~u~uʡasan naŋra. kairaan no~u~u ħo~uɾam tajni i tajwan,maɾaɾaʡis, ʦaaj pakafiɾo~u~u,fo~u~uɾaw saan tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan ħananaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk a maro~u~uʡ ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~una mako~u~utaaj maʡəmin. naiko~u~uran to~u~u i,ira ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ to~u~u ʦaajaj to~u~u pisaʡaɬ~ɮa ko~u~u kwapiŋ no~u~u ħo~uɾam saan i ,mafo~u~uɾaw aʦa maʡəpo~u~uɬ~ɮ nai ʦiɾaŋasan ,ta ħiʦəra saan to~una panijaro~u~uʡan taħanini. ano~u~u o~u~u mako~u~utaaj ħanən a mipaŋaŋan ko~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ saw? pakajniaj i kaʡamis no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ ira ko~u~uja ʡaɾo~u~u., ano~u~u maʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮto~u~u anʦa maʦiɬ~ɮaɾto~u~u, maŋo~u~uta:ito~u~u ko~u~u nano~u~um no~u~una ʡaɾo~u~u,saka paŋaŋan ħanto~u~u no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj ko~u~u "maŋo~u~utaaj" , nika masasiro~u~umato~u~u ko~u~u ŋiħaʡ taħanini, "mako~u~utaaj" saan to~uko~u paŋaŋaŋ. o~u~una mako~u~utaaj a nijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u satapaŋan kaħiʦəraan no~u~u misapanʦaħaj saan. tiriʡ ħan i ʦo~u~uka no~u~u tajwan i, i kaʡamis no~u~u patatiko~u~uan no~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ko~u~unis , tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ i sasifo~u~uʡan no~u~u tajwan ko~u~u mako~u~utaaj. ira ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj ato~u~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, ja miɾijas to~u~u (ʦiɾaŋasan} a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk maɾo~u~ukɾo~u~un a mafo~u~uɾaw i, maʔmin itini i taɾijo~uk no~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw paʦarʦar a maro~u~uʡ. nano~u~ujaan i,paɾitəmək sato~u~u masaŋsaŋasaw a maɾiwaswas; pasiʡamis ko~u~u pasiʡamisaj,pasitimo~u~uɾ ko~u~u pasitimo~u~uɾaj, ira ko~u~u taɾaətipaj.ɾo~u~upisak sato~u~u a mafo~u~uɾaw, ɬ~ɮəŋanto~u~u ja taɾaiko~u~uraj to~u~u ʦəkiw ato~u~u po~u~uɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u maʡo~u~usawaj a masanijaro~u~uʡ. kaʦaŋɾaħan ito~u~u, ano~u~u matatama to~u~u saʡajawaj a kəɾəŋ ato~u~u ʦəɬ~ɮas i, kaɾo~u~ukɾo~u~unan no~u~u kaɾaŋ taɾa rijar. miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~u~u i nijaro~u~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, saɾo~u~ufo~u~uɾo~u~ufo~u~uʦ sapawtiwti saan ko~u~u kaɾaŋ, maɾo~u~u sapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡ to~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u fijafijawaj a nijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~uro~u~uma sato~u~u kaɬ~ɮo~u~ufaħaj ko~u~u po~u~uɬ~ɮaw i taɾawaɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka nikaw to~u~u sasimi. ɾimaaj ko~u~u kasaŋasaw no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ-paʦiɬ~ɮaɾan, ʦiɾaŋasan, saɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋan, mo~u~unaɾi ato~u ʦikato~u~upaj. anini, ʦaajajto~u~u pipaɾafaŋ a maɾaħo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ, nikawrira, ʦaaj pisawaɬ~ɮ a mapo~u~uɾo~u~uŋ a misaŋasaw to~u~u miħʦaʔʦaan, itini a maħapinan ko~u~u rajraj no~u~u kasaɾawinawina. maħərək ko~u~u kapanajan no~u~u kaʦiħəraŋan i,o~u~u piiɾisinan ito~u~u.taħanini i,masasɾaɾsɾaɾ ħo~u ko~u~u kasaʡo~u~upo~u~uʔ no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~u mama no~u~u kapaħ a səɾaɾ ko~u~u miɾikakawaaj to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nijro~u~uʡ,ja ro~u~uma sasafaaj a səɾaɾ i,iraaj a masiɾsiɾ ko~u~u maɾo~u~u tajaɾ naŋra.ro~umasato~u~u, misaʦəpo~u~uʡ ko~u~u taɬ~ɮamanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡajaw no~u kaʦiħəraŋan i,mapo~u~uɾo~u~un ko~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ i rijar,to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ piʡaraj to~u~u pafəɾi no~u kawas to~u kakaənən.taħanini i,iɾisin ato~u~u misaʦəpo~u~uʡ tataʡaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u mako~u~utaaj.ano~u~u ʦiɾimaw i, katajni i nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~utaaj a minəŋnəŋ to~u~una faŋʦaɾaj a səraŋwan,ta mafanaʡ kiso~u to~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u misapanʦaħaj.
S.FORM: == Makutaay == Makutaay hananay, itiniay i pasawali nu Taywan, mililis tu lutuk mikecur tu Taypinyang ku kasa niyaru' nu Makutaay. Katimul nuna niyaru' u cepu' nu Talawadaw. Anu paka'amis ku rakat isu,matafesiwhu ku talawadaw i,ira kuya sacecay sanay a lutuk tumireng i kawali ,mahapinang tu kuna niaru' itatihi. I ti:yahu i, caayay kaitini ku paluma'an nuna niyaru', na miingidayho i tatihi nu talawadaw ku paluma'an nu tu'asan nangra. Kairaan nu Holam tayni i Taywan,malala'is, caay pakafilu,fulaw saan tayra i Cilangasan hananay a lutuk a maru' ku tamdaw nuna Makutaay ma'emin. Naikuran tu i,ira ku suwal tu caayay tu pisa'ada ku kwaping nu holam saan i ,mafulaw aca ma'epud nai Cilangasan ,ta hicera saan tona paniyaru'an tahanini. Anu u Makutaay hanen a mipangangan kuna niyaru' saw? Pakayniay i ka'amis nuna niyaru' ira kuya 'alu., anu ma'uradtu anca macidaltu, manguta:itu ku nanum nuna 'alu,saka pangangan hantu nu matu'asay ku "mangutaay" , nika masasirumatu ku ngiha' tahanini, "Makutaay" saan toko pangangang. Una Makutaay a niyaru', u satapangan kahiceraan nu misapancahay saan. Tiri' han i cuka nu Taywan i, i ka'amis nu patatikuan nu cidal kunis , tatudung i sasifu'an nu Taywan ku Makutaay. Ira ku suwal nu matu'asay atu tilid nu mitiliday, ya miliyas tu (Cilangasan} a lutuk maluklun a mafulaw i, ma^min itini i taliyok nu talawadaw pacarcar a maru'. Nanuyaan i,palitemek satu masangsangasaw a maliwaswas; pasi'amis ku pasi'amisay,pasitimul ku pasitimulay, ira ku talaetipay.Lupisak satu a mafulaw, dengantu ya talaikuray tu cekiw atu pudaw ku ma'usaway a masaniyaru'. Kacanglahan itu, anu matatama tu sa'ayaway a keleng atu cedas i, kaluklunan nu kalang tala riyar. Micadiway ku i niyaru'ay a tamdaw i, salufulufuc sapawtiwti saan ku kalang, malu sapalada' tu tamdaw nu fiyafiyaway a niyaru'. Uruma satu kadufahay ku pudaw i talawadaw, caay ka nikaw tu sasimi. Limaay ku kasangasaw nuna niyaru'-pacidalan, cilangasan, sadipungan, munali ato cikatupay. Anini, caayaytu pipalafang a malahulul, nikawrira, caay pisawad a mapulung a misangasaw tu mihca^caan, itini a mahapinan ku rayray nu kasalawinawina. Maherek ku kapanayan nu kaciherangan i,u piilisinan itu.Tahanini i,masaslalslal ho ku kasa'upu^ nu niyaru'. U mama nu kapah a selal ku milikakawaay tu demak nu niyru',ya ruma sasafaay a selal i,iraay a masilsil ku malu tayal nangra.Romasatu, misacepu' ku tadamanay a demak nu niyaru'Ayaw no kaciherangan i,mapulun ko fa'inayan no niyaro' i riyar,tudung pi'aray tu pafeli no kawas to kakaenen.Tahanini i,ilisin atu misacepu' tata'angay a demak nu Makutaay.Anu cilimaw i, katayni i niyaru' nu Makutaay a minengneng tuna fangcalay a serangwan,ta mafana' kiso tu 'urip nu misapancahay.
S.PHON: == mako~u~utaaj == mako~u~utaaj ħananaj, itiniaj i pasawaɾi no~u~u tajwan, miɾiɾis to~u~u ɾo~u~uto~u~uk mikəʦo~u~ur to~u~u tajpinjaŋ ko~u~u kasa nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~utaaj. katimo~u~uɾ no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ o~u~u ʦəpo~u~uʡ no~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw. ano~u~u pakaʡamis ko~u~u rakat iso~u~u,matafəsiwħo~u~u ko~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw i,ira ko~u~uja saʦəʦaj sanaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk to~u~umirəŋ i kawaɾi ,maħapinaŋ to~u~u ko~u~una niaro~u~uʡ itatiħi. i ti:jaħo~u~u i, ʦaajaj kaitini ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaʡan no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ, na miiŋiɬ~ɮajħo~u i tatiħi no~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u paɾo~u~umaʡan no~u~u to~u~uʡasan naŋra. kairaan no~u~u ħo~uɾam tajni i tajwan,maɾaɾaʡis, ʦaaj pakafiɾo~u~u,fo~u~uɾaw saan tajra i ʦiɾaŋasan ħananaj a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk a maro~u~uʡ ko~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~una mako~u~utaaj maʡəmin. naiko~u~uran to~u~u i,ira ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ to~u~u ʦaajaj to~u~u pisaʡaɬ~ɮa ko~u~u kwapiŋ no~u~u ħo~uɾam saan i ,mafo~u~uɾaw aʦa maʡəpo~u~uɬ~ɮ nai ʦiɾaŋasan ,ta ħiʦəra saan to~una panijaro~u~uʡan taħanini. ano~u~u o~u~u mako~u~utaaj ħanən a mipaŋaŋan ko~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ saw? pakajniaj i kaʡamis no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ ira ko~u~uja ʡaɾo~u~u., ano~u~u maʡo~u~uraɬ~ɮto~u~u anʦa maʦiɬ~ɮaɾto~u~u, maŋo~u~uta:ito~u~u ko~u~u nano~u~um no~u~una ʡaɾo~u~u,saka paŋaŋan ħanto~u~u no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj ko~u~u "maŋo~u~utaaj" , nika masasiro~u~umato~u~u ko~u~u ŋiħaʡ taħanini, "mako~u~utaaj" saan to~uko~u paŋaŋaŋ. o~u~una mako~u~utaaj a nijaro~u~uʡ, o~u~u satapaŋan kaħiʦəraan no~u~u misapanʦaħaj saan. tiriʡ ħan i ʦo~u~uka no~u~u tajwan i, i kaʡamis no~u~u patatiko~u~uan no~u~u ʦiɬ~ɮaɾ ko~u~unis , tato~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ i sasifo~u~uʡan no~u~u tajwan ko~u~u mako~u~utaaj. ira ko~u~u so~u~uwaɾ no~u~u mato~u~uʡasaj ato~u~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ no~u~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, ja miɾijas to~u~u (ʦiɾaŋasan} a ɾo~u~uto~u~uk maɾo~u~ukɾo~u~un a mafo~u~uɾaw i, maʔmin itini i taɾijo~uk no~u~u taɾawaɬ~ɮaw paʦarʦar a maro~u~uʡ. nano~u~ujaan i,paɾitəmək sato~u~u masaŋsaŋasaw a maɾiwaswas; pasiʡamis ko~u~u pasiʡamisaj,pasitimo~u~uɾ ko~u~u pasitimo~u~uɾaj, ira ko~u~u taɾaətipaj.ɾo~u~upisak sato~u~u a mafo~u~uɾaw, ɬ~ɮəŋanto~u~u ja taɾaiko~u~uraj to~u~u ʦəkiw ato~u~u po~u~uɬ~ɮaw ko~u~u maʡo~u~usawaj a masanijaro~u~uʡ. kaʦaŋɾaħan ito~u~u, ano~u~u matatama to~u~u saʡajawaj a kəɾəŋ ato~u~u ʦəɬ~ɮas i, kaɾo~u~ukɾo~u~unan no~u~u kaɾaŋ taɾa rijar. miʦaɬ~ɮiwaj ko~u~u i nijaro~u~uʡaj a tamɬ~ɮaw i, saɾo~u~ufo~u~uɾo~u~ufo~u~uʦ sapawtiwti saan ko~u~u kaɾaŋ, maɾo~u~u sapaɾaɬ~ɮaʡ to~u~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u~u fijafijawaj a nijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~uro~u~uma sato~u~u kaɬ~ɮo~u~ufaħaj ko~u~u po~u~uɬ~ɮaw i taɾawaɬ~ɮaw, ʦaaj ka nikaw to~u~u sasimi. ɾimaaj ko~u~u kasaŋasaw no~u~una nijaro~u~uʡ-paʦiɬ~ɮaɾan, ʦiɾaŋasan, saɬ~ɮipo~u~uŋan, mo~u~unaɾi ato~u ʦikato~u~upaj. anini, ʦaajajto~u~u pipaɾafaŋ a maɾaħo~u~uɾo~u~uɾ, nikawrira, ʦaaj pisawaɬ~ɮ a mapo~u~uɾo~u~uŋ a misaŋasaw to~u~u miħʦaʔʦaan, itini a maħapinan ko~u~u rajraj no~u~u kasaɾawinawina. maħərək ko~u~u kapanajan no~u~u kaʦiħəraŋan i,o~u~u piiɾisinan ito~u~u.taħanini i,masasɾaɾsɾaɾ ħo~u ko~u~u kasaʡo~u~upo~u~uʔ no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡ. o~u~u mama no~u~u kapaħ a səɾaɾ ko~u~u miɾikakawaaj to~u~u ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nijro~u~uʡ,ja ro~u~uma sasafaaj a səɾaɾ i,iraaj a masiɾsiɾ ko~u~u maɾo~u~u tajaɾ naŋra.ro~umasato~u~u, misaʦəpo~u~uʡ ko~u~u taɬ~ɮamanaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u nijaro~u~uʡajaw no~u kaʦiħəraŋan i,mapo~u~uɾo~u~un ko~u faʡinajan no~u nijaro~uʡ i rijar,to~u~uɬ~ɮo~u~uŋ piʡaraj to~u~u pafəɾi no~u kawas to~u kakaənən.taħanini i,iɾisin ato~u~u misaʦəpo~u~uʡ tataʡaŋaj a ɬ~ɮəmak no~u~u mako~u~utaaj.ano~u~u ʦiɾimaw i, katajni i nijaro~u~uʡ no~u~u mako~u~utaaj a minəŋnəŋ to~u~una faŋʦaɾaj a səraŋwan,ta mafanaʡ kiso~u to~u~u ʡo~u~urip no~u~u misapanʦaħaj.
